title: Limiting beliefs coaching
description: Identify limiting beliefs in clients, help them recognize and overcome them, and present transformative opportunities for lasting change.
full_idea: Remember that in this season of my life I need to practice being able to find limiting beliefs in people, help them recognize the belief, help them believe that they are capable of overcoming that limiting belief, and then present them the opportunity to do so in a way that results in them being permanently changed from that point forward
source_text: Remember that in this season of my life I need to practice being able to find limiting beliefs in people, help them recognize the belief, help them believe that they are capable of overcoming that limiting belief, and then present them the opportunity to do so in a way that results in them being permanently changed from that point forward
